allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/categories" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.name })

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/products/featured" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.name + " - Rs. " + $_.price })
PowerShell(cd "c:\\Wamp.NET\\sites\\project-name"; php artisan tinker --execute="App\\Models\\Product::all\(\)->each\(function\(\\$p\){ echo \\$p->id . ' ' . \\$p->name . PHP_EOL; }\);" 2>&1)
PowerShell(cd "c:\\Wamp.NET\\sites\\project-name"; php artisan tinker --execute="foreach\(App\\Models\\Product::all\(\) as \\$p\) { echo \\$p->id . ' - ' . \\$p->name . PHP_EOL; }" 2>&1)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/login" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json";"Content-Type"="application/json";"X-Cart-Token"="t1"} -Body '{"email":"admin@huzaifamobile.pk","password":"password"}'; $tok = \($login.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/admin/orders" -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json";"Authorization"="Bearer $tok"}; $orders = \($resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).data; Write-Host "First order ID: $\($orders[0].id\), UUID: $\($orders[0].uuid\), status: $\($orders[0].status\)")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/login" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json";"Content-Type"="application/json";"X-Cart-Token"="t1"} -Body '{"email":"admin@huzaifamobile.pk","password":"password"}'; $tok = \($login.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/admin/orders/4/status" -Method PUT -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json";"Content-Type"="application/json";"Authorization"="Bearer $tok"} -Body '{"status":"confirmed"}'; Write-Host "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $resp.Content)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/login" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json";"Content-Type"="application/json";"X-Cart-Token"="t1"} -Body '{"email":"admin@huzaifamobile.pk","password":"password"}'; $tok = \($login.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/admin/orders/9b9981b8-7a1f-4ec5-995c-c2d55abfd794/status" -Method PUT -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json";"Content-Type"="application/json";"Authorization"="Bearer $tok"} -Body '{"status":"confirmed"}'; Write-Host "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $resp.Content)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Wamp.NET\\sites\\project-name"; php artisan config:clear 2>&1 | Out-Null; $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/login" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json";"Content-Type"="application/json";"X-Cart-Token"="t1"} -Body '{"email":"admin@huzaifamobile.pk","password":"password"}'; $tok = \($login.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).token; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/admin/orders/9b9981b8-7a1f-4ec5-995c-c2d55abfd794/status" -Method PUT -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json";"Content-Type"="application/json";"Authorization"="Bearer $tok"} -Body '{"status":"processing"}'; Write-Host "HTTP: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; \($resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).status)

PowerShell(php artisan config:clear 2>&1 | Out-Null; $urls = @\("http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/flash-sales","http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/recently-viewed"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json";"X-Cart-Token"="test"}; Write-Host "$\($r.StatusCode\) $url" } catch { Write-Host "FAIL $url" } })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Wamp.NET\\sites\\project-name"; php artisan tinker --execute="Mail::raw\('Test email', function\(\\$m\) { \\$m->to\('khan.muhammad@icustoms.ai'\)->subject\('Test from Huzaifa Mobile'\); }\); echo 'Sent';" 2>&1)
